note: DL training succeeded after NaN fix (4th attempt). Late fusion killed at step 6/6 due to CPU contention. Key DL results captured.

nan_fix.root_cause: Raw IMU scale mismatch (±70 raw vs model ±0.2 output) → gradient explosion
nan_fix.fix: Per-channel z-norm, NaN→0, clip ±10, kaiming init, reduced dims 128→64, LR 1e-4

verdict: PARTIAL — DL trains successfully after NaN fix but underperforms handcrafted features (obs 4.80 vs 3.21 baseline). Attention patterns clinically sensible. DL alone not competitive at N=178 but NaN is fixable with proper normalization.
